preamble: Depalatalization of the voiceless palatal stop [c] to the voiceless alveolar stop [t], a common simplification of the palatal series towards more central points of articulation.

examples.note: Simplification of phonemic palatal stops to alveolar or dental stops.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
